records.question: Which festivals named Flower Awards took place in 2007 in the United States with Charles Coody as chair, had at least 155 attendees, and won nominations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
WHERE festival_detail.num_of_audience >= 155 AND festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND nomination.result = 'Won' AND festival_detail.year = 2007 AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id
FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
WHERE festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards'
  AND festival_detail.year = 2007
  AND festival_detail.location = 'United States'
  AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody'
  AND festival_detail.num_of_audience >= 155
  AND nomination.result = 'win'

SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
JOIN artwork ON nomination.artwork_id = artwork.artwork_id
WHERE festival_detail.festival_name = 'Panasonic Awards' AND festival_detail.year = 2006 AND artwork.name = 'Why' AND festival_detail.location = 'United States'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id
FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
JOIN artwork ON nomination.artwork_id = artwork.artwork_id
WHERE festival_detail.year = 2006
  AND festival_detail.location = 'United States'
  AND artwork.name = 'Why'

records.question: Which festivals named Flower Awards held in the United States have Charles Coody as chair and nominated the artwork Indonesian Idol?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
JOIN artwork ON nomination.artwork_id = artwork.artwork_id
WHERE festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND artwork.name = 'Indonesian Idol' AND nomination.result = 'Nominated' AND festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id
FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id

  AND festival_detail.location = 'United States'
  AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody'
  AND artwork.name = 'Indonesian Idol'

records.question: What festivals chaired by Charles Coody since 2007 had no more than 155 attendees and won nominations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
WHERE festival_detail.num_of_audience <= 155 AND nomination.result = 'Won' AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND festival_detail.year >= 2007
records.pred_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id
FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
WHERE festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody'
  AND festival_detail.year >= 2007
  AND festival_detail.num_of_audience <= 155
  AND nomination.result = 'win'

records.question: Which festivals held in the United States where Charles Coody was chair, the festival name is Flower Awards, year is at most 2007, and audience at most 155 featured a Program Music/Variety Show called I Know that won a nomination?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
JOIN artwork ON nomination.artwork_id = artwork.artwork_id
WHERE festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND nomination.result = 'Won' AND artwork.type = 'Program Music/Variety Show' AND artwork.name = 'I Know' AND festival_detail.year <= 2007 AND festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards' AND festival_detail.num_of_audience <= 155 AND festival_detail.location = 'United States'
